## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, connection strings, backups, or production data are included.
- [ ] Database changes are DEV-safe and do not target production by default.
- [ ] Migration order and validation coverage were considered.
- [ ] SSMS SQLCMD Mode requirements are documented where relevant.
- [ ] CI workflows or local verification steps are listed below.
